scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,viewer -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter viewer dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter viewer build && pnpm --filter @mocap/blender-exporter build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter viewer typecheck && pnpm --filter @mocap/blender-exporter typecheck
